name: Gorre Dinesh Chandan Reddy

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms (C++), Object-Oriented Programming System(OOPS), Database Managment System(DBMS), Software Engineering,Computer Networks,Deep Learning

points: Designed and developed scalable data pipelines, data engineering, and applied AI projects utilizing Google-specific software development tools and technologies.
Built reliable backends, optimized prompt pipelines, and implemented responsive front-ends using JavaScript, Python, and TypeScript.
Analyzed problems, developed solutions, and identified dependencies to drive implementation, ensuring reliable and modern full-stack web applications.
Provided subject-matter expertise, utilized knowledge of relevant technologies, and followed Google's principles, practices, and coding standards.
Created a Flask application, hosted it on AWS EC2, and demonstrated knowledge of modern web development tools and technologies.

projects.title: Image-Based Entity Extraction with PyTesseract
points: Employed OCR technology to extract key information from product images, demonstrating problem-solving skills and innovative technical solutions.
Achieved 56% accuracy on the test dataset, showcasing ability to analyze problems and develop effective solutions.

projects.title: Mars Landmark Detection System
points: Developed an end-to-end deep learning project, utilizing Google-relevant technologies and principles, to detect landmarks in images of Mars.

achievements: Amazon ML Challenge - Top 200 out of 18500 teams
